title: Install @dnd-kit deps and create use-grid-feed.ts hook with GridCard type
description: pnpm --filter @personal-ai/ui add @dnd-kit/core @dnd-kit/sortable @dnd-kit/utilities. Create src/hooks/use-grid-feed.ts that fetches 6 APIs in parallel (threads, jobs, inbox/all, beliefs, tasks, knowledge/sources), normalizes into GridCard[], sorts by timestamp desc, manages filter state. Export from hooks/index.ts.

title: Create GridCard.tsx component and Grid.tsx page with masonry layout, filter bar, dnd, and localStorage persistence
description: GridCard: type icon + colored label, relative timestamp, 2-4 line preview, click navigates, hover lift, 3 size variants (small/medium/large by type). Grid.tsx: filter bar with pill toggles (All|Chats|Research|Briefings|Memories|Tasks|Knowledge), masonry layout via @dnd-kit/sortable, responsive 2-4 columns, drag-to-rearrange persisted to localStorage pai-grid-order, pin support.

title: Wire Grid page routing: App.tsx route + Layout.tsx nav item + MobileTabBar
description: App.tsx: import Grid page, add /grid route inside AuthGate Layout. Layout.tsx: add Grid to navItems between Inbox and Chat with grid icon SVG. MobileTabBar.tsx: add Grid to primaryTabs or moreTabs.

title: Build verification — pnpm build + existing tests pass
description: Run pnpm build to verify TypeScript compilation and Vite build succeed. Run pnpm test to verify existing tests still pass. Fix any issues.
